sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116269" key="w)|oqesi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ᾠο-θεσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n116269.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">row of eggs,</tr_> i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ouate border,</tr_> Aristeas <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
